ground_truth.title: Shop Affordable Home Furnishings & Home Goods - IKEA
ground_truth.main_content: Welcome to IKEA USA. Shop affordable furniture and home goods at IKEA! Discover furnishings and inspiration to create a better life at home. Shop online or in store! Winter Sale: Save on hundreds of items now thru Jan 13th! IKEA Winter Sale offers up to 50% off select items, and IKEA Loyalty Program Members get an additional 10% off sale items. Offer valid 12/10-1/13/26. Featured offers: 15% off GULLABERG chest of drawers, Save on holiday cooking and eating essentials, Cute kids' finds from $3.99, Bedroom textiles starting at $3.99. Product categories: Winter holiday shop, Storage & organization, Sofas & armchairs, Beds & mattresses, Kitchen appliances & supplies, Tables & chairs, Kitchenware & tableware, Home decor & accessories, Lighting, Baby & kids, Desks & desk chairs, Rugs & home textiles, Storage containers organizers & baskets, Bathroom furniture supplies & more, Outdoor, Window treatments & coverings, Plants & planters, Laundry & cleaning, Home electronics, IKEA Food & Swedish restaurant, Pet accessories, Home improvement, Smart home. IKEA Family members get free shipping on qualifying small orders over $50.
with: Welcome to IKEA USA. Shop affordable furniture and home goods at IKEA!
Save on hundreds of items now thru Jan 13th! IKEA Winter Sale offers up to 50% off select items.
IKEA Loyalty Program Members get an additional 10% off sale items through 1/13/26.
Featured offer: 15% off GULLABERG chest of drawers - A white GULLABERG chest of 3 drawers in a room with yellow walls.
IKEA Family members get free shipping on qualifying small orders over $50*
